---
title: "Notes"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date"
    title: "Note"
    categories: "Tags"
    description: "Summary"
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
---

Technical notes, experiment logs, debugging journals, and everything else.

Use `_template.qmd` as a starting point for new entries.
